wemble
Things Stuff Company
Things Stuff Company

One developer + AI

A one-man shop that
doesn't build like one.

Wemble is a software company built around a simple bet: one developer with the right AI tools can ship what used to take a team. We build products, contribute to open source, and prove it every day.

See our things Read our stuff

Products & Open Source

What we're building

Live

Fitnito

Gym scheduling that replaced a $500/month enterprise tool. Simple, affordable, and used by real gyms across Canada.

LAB
Exploring

Healthware

Exploring how AI can drag healthcare into the modern age. Experimental apps: some will help, all will be interesting.

Live

Fitify

Fitness for people who hate fitness. Daily tips that trick you into exercising. Walk your dog? Cardio.

Open Source

⚡

DashBot

Real-time AI agent dashboard. Rails 8 + React + OpenClaw. MIT.
🔌

dashbot-openclaw

OpenClaw plugin that connects AI agents to DashBot. TypeScript. MIT.
🌐

wemble.com

This website. Jekyll + Tailwind CSS + Docker. MIT.
See all the things →

Stuff

Stuff we built & learned

Getting a Phone Call From Norm Macdonald

An AI voice agent that answers real phone calls with a cloned voice, running almost entirely on a Mac mini.

The Heartbeat Economy: Local Models for Always-On Monitoring

Why we moved our agents' routine monitoring checks off cloud APIs and onto a 3B model running on a Mac mini, and what broke along the way.

Fitify: Fitness for People Who Hate Fitness

Micro-workouts disguised as normal life. Designed, built, and launched solo in a few weeks. No spandex required.
All the stuff →

How one person ships like a team

Wemble isn't a typical software company. There's no team of 12. No project managers. No Jira board (thank god).

It's one developer with AI agents that handle research, write code, monitor production, and draft the write-ups. The same AI that powers our products also helps build them. We're not just using AI. We're proving what's possible when you lean all the way in.

Every product on this site was built this way. Every write-up, every open source contribution. If you're curious what that looks like in practice, read our stuff or browse the code.

Yes, it's a real corporation.

Paperwork and all. The experiment is what we do with it.
